steps.description: Add top-priority location rule to block /.env and all hidden paths.
Prevent accidental inclusion of secret files in nginx image build context.
Remove insecure .env copy directives and only copy explicit config files.
Fail CI if gateway serves /.env with any status other than 403/404.
steps.replace_code:
- name: /.env must not be served
  run: |
    code=$(curl -s -o /dev/null -w '%{http_code}' http://localhost:8888/.env)
    if [ "$code" != "404" ] && [ "$code" != "403" ]; then
      echo "FAIL: /.env returned $code"; exit 1
    fi

verification.description: Generic hidden files must also be blocked
